notes: Tried disabling Esync, D3d11 and using Wine D3d11. It opens saying "Installing Games for Windows? - Live setup" then fails.
title: Street Fighter X Tekken

notes: Patch needed to be installed to remove GFWL. I installed it via standard wine https://docs.google.com/uc?id=0B6A_ITzSjsF3RDRPcVljVHVhXzQ and show SFxTK steam installation path.
title: Street Fighter X Tekken

notes:
Works perfectly well after installing the Community Mod Patch from: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=649186874

It should be noted because of the nature of this patch, however, that online play does not work.
title: Street Fighter X Tekken
